news.title: Nvidia, SK to detail cooperation plan as Huang flags prolonged chip shortage
news.summary: Nvidia and South Korea's SK are expected to announce a plan ‌for cooperation between the two companies on ‌Monday, with the boss of the U.S. chipmaker saying that ​the ongoing memory shortage would persist for "quite a few years".  A spokesperson for SK Hynix said group chairman Chey Tae-won and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang plan ‌to brief media ⁠about the plan on Monday morning, confirming a report by Newsis.  Huang separately said ⁠that Nvidia could make announcements with SK on Monday.
